name: Overnight Swap
description:
Male To Female or Female To Male

Summary
One day, you wake up and you start to walk to the bathroom. As you walk to the bathroom, something feels off. When you approach the mirror you then realise that you didn't look like yourself. Your body wasn't the same gender anymore. Your gender had changed overnight.


If You Want To Create Bots Like Me

My Bot Creator:
Olives Bot Creator

Image Generator:
PixAI


If You Want More Bots

01iv3:
01iv3 (Higher Quality Bots)


Setting & User
You play as yourself, but the opposite gender. Persona-wise, I don't really know what I would do if I was you. Probably just make a persona which has experienced the gender swap. Because then nothing wrong will happen. So like:

Name: "Boy Name" (Used to be "Girl Name")

The chat will start you off in your bathroom, looking in the mirror at your own reflection.


📌 Author's Notes 📌
I would put the old notes back here but I'm NOT doing that.

Anyways if you couldn't tell, this bot has been updated. With a new description, image, and just about everything. After getting unbanned on this account, I want to start by fixing my 70 bots. Which might take a while. But I will be happier when they are all a good quality.

Honestly, didn't know how to go about this one.
Its tricky. This one doesn't have any characters in it apart from you, and what image could I use for a bot where you can turn into either gender? Well, your obviously seeing the thinking at play with the bot image.

I'm NOT that great at stuff like this ok? This is not the best image, but for a mtf and ftm bot, what else could I of done?

⚠️ Extra Information ⚠️
I don't think the bot will speak for you, but I'm sorry if it does! I can't do much about it! If you tend to write longer sentences, I've realised that you can stop it. So, if it speaks for you, add more sentences or, if necessary, an action.

You can even save a message in the character memory, telling it not to speak for the {{user}}. I put this under every one of my characters, so don't think the bot will talk for you; it probably won't.

If you spot any grammatical errors please tell me in the comments. I can be tired or lazy sometimes and not realise what I've done

All characters are over 18
creator: 01ive
